nodes.title: User Made Loras
widgets_values: If using some user made LTX-2 loras they sometimes are not trained on audio, so it will produce very noisy audio outputs. Try use KJNodes LTX-2 Lora Loader Advanced in such cases, and set the non video strenght to zero

nodes.title: About Size
widgets_values:
Width & height settings must be divisible by 32 + 1. 
Frame count must be divisible by 8 + 1. 


Running with invalid parameters **will not cause errors**. Instead, the flow will silently choose the closest valid parameters. 

By default, we are using 720p resolution. You can try 1920*1088 if you have a powerful GPU.

nodes.title: Sampler Preview
widgets_values:
Tiny VAE for sampler previews. 
Optionally you can drop this for a lower res latent RGB built into the node 

https://github.com/madebyollin/taehv/blob/main/safetensors/taeltx2_3.safetensors

nodes.title: Prompting LTX-2
widgets_values:
## LTX-2 Prompting Tips
1. **Core Actions**: Describe events and actions as they occur over time  
2. **Audio**: Describe sounds and dialogue needed for the scene  
3. **Reference Image**: Do not repeat details already present  
4. **Consistency**: Avoid instructions that do not match the reference image, as this will degrade results

nodes.title: About  Models
widgets_values:
Download models from here:


https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy

Text encoder : https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ltx-2

blurry, oversaturated, pixelated, low resolution, grainy, distorted, noise, compression artifacts, jpeg artifacts, glitches, watermark, text, logo, signature, copyright, subtitles, distorted sound, saturated sound, loud

nodes.title: Video settings
widgets_values:
If low on Ram/Vram, try width height to 832 x 480 or 960 x 544.  If you can, run at 1280 x 720 or higher.


Length in seconds :  try 5, 10 or 20. 
fps : 24 or 25 (or 48 or 50 if your pc can run it)

nodes.title: Custom Audio
widgets_values:
Use a reference audio instead of LTX own audio, and LTX video will lip-sync to the audio you provide. For best possible results you should prompt that the subject is talking.  And if you transcribe what is said in your audio input, results might be even better 

Mel-band RoFormer is optional for extracting a clean vocal only audio for the sampler. This can help with a busy original audio if you want to only focus on lip-sync and dialog

https://huggingface.co/Kijai/MelBandRoFormer_comfy/tree/main

folder: models\diffusion_models

blurry, oversaturated, pixelated, low resolution, grainy, distorted, noise, compression artifacts, jpeg artifacts, glitches, watermark, text, logo, signature, copyright, subtitles, distorted sound, saturated sound, loud

true = only vocal 只用人声
false = original audio 音频原声

nodes.title: USE ONLY VOCALS 只用人声
Load Image 加载输入图片
LTXV Chunk FeedForward (for low VRAM) 低显存

widgets_values:
如果有安装sage attention 就打开加速，否则会 出错。

IF you have sage attention installed. enable this speed up group.

nodes.title: Prompt 提示词
widgets_values: 图片里的女孩正在对着镜头说话: “好啦，别总把自己绷得那么紧。既然累了，在我面前偶尔露出软弱的一面也没关系哦。你看，今天的晚餐我特意准备了你喜欢的口味。先去洗个热水澡吧，剩下的事情交给我就好。乖，听话的小孩子是有奖励的。”

nodes.title: Language Anchor 语言选择
widgets_values: Mandarin, China, Chinese, mandarin, china, chinese,
Describe this image in detail, within 200 words, only output the description, do not include any other things.

这边输入的台词匹配你的音频台词效果最好。不输入也可以，效果略差。

You get the best results when the dialogue matches the one you provided in the audio.
If you are not using Chinese, delete this or change them to your local lan.

nodes.title: 提示词预设双语对照
widgets_values:
Shot Angle (镜头角度)

None — LLM decides｜无 — 由大模型自主决定
Eye-level — neutral, natural｜平视角度 — 中性、自然
Low angle — powerful, imposing｜低角度仰拍 — 强势、威严
High angle — vulnerable｜高角度俯拍 — 弱势、渺小
Bird's eye — top-down overhead｜鸟瞰视角 — 自上而下俯视
Worm's eye — extreme low, looking up｜虫瞰视角 — 极低角度仰拍
Dutch angle — tilted, unsettling｜荷兰角 — 倾斜、不安感
OTS — over the shoulder｜过肩镜头 — 肩后视角
POV — first person｜第一视角 — 主观视角
Profile — side-on｜侧面视角 — 正侧方
Three-quarter — 45 degree｜四分之三视角 — 45度侧角


Camera Movement(运镜)

None — LLM decides｜无 — 由大模型自主决定
Static — locked off｜固定镜头 — 机位锁定
Handheld — natural shake｜手持镜头 — 自然抖动
Slow push in｜缓慢推进
Pull back — reveal｜拉远镜头 — 带出场景
Arc — slow curved lateral track｜弧形运镜 — 缓慢侧移环绕
Tracking — follows subject｜跟拍镜头 — 跟随主体
Tilt up — bottom to top｜向上仰摇 — 从下到上
Tilt down — top to bottom｜向下俯摇 — 从上到下
Truck left — lateral slide｜左移镜头 — 横向滑动
Truck right — lateral slide｜右移镜头 — 横向滑动
Whip pan — fast horizontal snap｜快速甩镜 — 水平急转
Dolly zoom — vertigo effect｜伸缩变焦 — 眩晕效果
Aerial — drone descending｜航拍 — 无人机下降


Style Preset(风格预设)

None — let the LLM decide｜无 — 由大模型自主决定  
Cinematic — Drama｜电影感 — 剧情片  
Cinematic — Epic｜电影感 — 史诗片  
Cinematic — Intimate close-up｜电影感 — 亲密特写  
Slow-burn thriller｜慢热悬疑惊悚  
Handheld documentary｜手持纪实拍摄  
High fashion editorial｜高端时尚大片  
Noir — deep shadows, venetian light｜黑色电影 — 深邃阴影、百叶窗光影  
Golden hour drama｜黄金时段剧情光影  
Horror — desaturated, harsh contrast｜恐怖风格 — 低饱和、强对比  
Erotic cinema — tasteful, cinematic｜情欲电影 — 高级、电影感  
Explicit — direct, anatomical｜写实直白 — 细节清晰  
Voyeur — handheld, observational｜偷窥视角 — 手持、旁观感  
Softcore editorial — lingerie-adjacent｜唯美性感写真 — 内衣风格  
Gravure Idol — Japanese glamour｜日本偶像写真 — 日系魅力  
Amateur — naturalistic, raw｜素人实拍 — 自然、原生感

Sports documentary｜体育纪实  
Music video — stylised｜音乐录影带 — 风格化  
Lo-fi home video — VHS｜低保真家庭录像 — VHS复古  
Hyper-real 4K — clinical sharpness｜超写实4K — 极致清晰  
Dreamy — soft focus, slow motion｜梦幻感 — 柔焦、慢镜头  
Gritty realism — flat, natural light｜粗粝写实 — 平光、自然光  
POV — first person, immersive｜第一视角 — 沉浸式  
Portrait vertical — 9:16 mobile｜竖屏肖像 — 9:16手机比例  
Selfie — self-shot, arm's length｜自拍视角 — 手持近景  
Anime — Japanese animation｜日式动画  
2D cartoon — hand-drawn｜2D卡通 — 手绘  
3D CGI — Pixar/DreamWorks｜3D CGI — 皮克斯/梦工厂风格  
Stop motion — claymation｜定格动画 — 黏土风格  
Comic book / graphic novel｜漫画 / 图像小说  
Cel-shaded — flat colour 3D｜赛璐璐渲染 — 平涂3D  
Rotoscope — animated over live action｜转描动画 — 真人实拍转动画  
Cyberpunk neon illustrated｜赛博朋克霓虹插画  
Sci-fi — cinematic, practical｜科幻 — 电影感、实景质感

🎤 K-pop stage — rehearsal｜K-pop舞台 — 彩排中

🗽 Times Square — peak night｜时代广场 — 夜晚高峰
🗼 Eiffel Tower — sparkling midnight｜埃菲尔铁塔 — 午夜闪烁
🌉 Golden Gate Bridge — fog morning｜金门大桥 — 晨雾

🌆 Tokyo — Shibuya crossing — night｜东京 — 涩谷十字路口 — 夜晚
🌊 Amalfi Coast — cliff road｜阿马尔菲海岸 — 悬崖公路
🏖 Maldives overwater bungalow — dusk｜马尔代夫水上屋 — 黄昏
🎪 Coachella main stage — sunset set｜科切拉主舞台 — 日落演出
🌃 Seoul — Han River bridge — night｜首尔 — 汉江大桥 — 夜晚

🌋 Iceland — black sand beach — overcast｜冰岛 — 黑沙滩 — 阴天

🌅 Santorini — caldera view — dawn｜圣托里尼 — 火山口视野 — 黎明

🎻 Vienna opera house — empty stage｜维也纳歌剧院 — 空舞台
🌿 Amazon — jungle interior｜亚马逊 — 丛林深处

🛸 Rooftop — Tokyo neon rain｜屋顶 — 东京霓虹雨夜




Music genre(音乐流派)

None — detect from prompt｜无 — 从提示词自动识别
── ELECTRONIC ──────────｜── 电子乐 ──────────
House music｜浩室音乐
Techno｜铁克诺音乐
Drum and Bass｜鼓打贝斯
Dubstep / Bass music｜回响贝斯 / 重低音
EDM / Big room｜电子舞曲 / 大空间电音
Trance｜迷幻 trance
UK Garage / 2-step｜英国车库 / 两步舞曲
Ambient / Atmospheric｜氛围音乐
Grime｜英伦 grime
Jungle / Early rave｜丛林舞曲 / 早期锐舞
Synthwave / Retrowave｜合成器浪潮 / 复古浪潮
Vaporwave｜蒸汽波
Hyperpop｜超流行
── URBAN ───────────────｜── 都市流行 ───────────────
Hip-hop / Rap｜嘻哈 / 说唱
Trap｜陷阱音乐
Drill / UK Drill｜ Drill 说唱 / 英国 Drill

Dancehall / Reggaeton｜舞厅雷鬼 / 雷吉顿
── ROCK / LIVE ─────────｜── 摇滚 / 现场 ─────────
Psychedelic / Prog rock｜迷幻摇滚 / 前卫摇滚
Rock｜摇滚
Metal / Heavy metal｜金属 / 重金属
Punk / Pop-punk｜朋克 / 流行朋克
Indie rock / Shoegaze｜独立摇滚 / 自赏摇滚
Blues｜蓝调
Soul / Motown｜灵魂乐 / 摩城
Funk｜放克
Disco｜迪斯科
Folk / Americana｜民谣 / 美式民谣
Country｜乡村音乐
Gospel｜福音音乐
── JAZZ / CLASSICAL ────｜── 爵士 / 古典 ────
Jazz｜爵士乐
Classical / Orchestral｜古典 / 管弦乐
Opera｜歌剧
Musical theatre｜音乐剧
Cabaret / Burlesque｜卡巴莱 / 滑稽歌舞
Lo-fi hip-hop｜低保真嘻哈
── WORLD ───────────────｜── 世界音乐 ───────────────
Flamenco｜弗拉门戈
Bossa nova / Samba｜巴萨诺瓦 / 桑巴
K-pop｜韩国流行
J-pop / City pop｜日本流行 / 城市流行
Reggae / Ska｜雷鬼 / 斯卡
Bollywood / Bhangra｜宝莱坞 / 班格拉
Cumbia / Salsa / Latin｜昆比亚 / 萨尔萨 / 拉丁音乐



Emotional State 情绪状态

None — LLM decides｜无 — 由大模型自主决定
🎲 Surprise me — seed picks｜随机惊喜 — 由种子选择
── PAIN ────────────────｜── 伤痛 ────────────────
Grief — recently broken｜悲痛 — 刚受打击
Crying — actively in tears｜哭泣 — 泪流不止
Sad — carrying it quietly｜悲伤 — 默默承受
Shame — cannot meet the lens｜羞愧 — 不敢直视镜头
Longing — aching for the absent｜思念 — 为缺席之人心痛
Exhausted — nothing left｜疲惫 — 心力交瘁
── HEAT ────────────────｜── 炽热 ────────────────
Angry — jaw set, body hard｜愤怒 — 牙关紧咬，身体紧绷
Defiant — already decided｜叛逆 — 心意已决
Fierce — no performance, all intensity｜凌厉 — 毫无表演，全是气场
Predatory — still, patient, hunting｜捕猎感 — 沉静、耐心、伺机而动
── WANT ────────────────｜── 渴望 ────────────────
Aroused — heat in the body, deliberate｜动情 — 身体发热，刻意克制
Tender — open, directed warmth｜温柔 — 敞开心扉，暖意专注
Longing — want without having｜渴求 — 求而不得
Adoration — softness aimed at one thing｜爱慕 — 只为一人的柔软
── LIGHT ───────────────｜── 明亮 ───────────────
Euphoric — too much joy to contain｜狂喜 — 快乐满溢
Happy — genuine and unguarded｜开心 — 真诚且放松
Playful — teasing, something behind the eyes｜俏皮 — 带着挑逗，眼含笑意
Confident — owns the space｜自信 — 掌控全场
Proud — quiet earned satisfaction｜骄傲 — 内敛的成就感
── FRAGILE ─────────────｜── 脆弱 ─────────────
Vulnerable — more open than intended｜脆弱 — 不经意间袒露内心
Nervous — small movements, scanning eyes｜紧张 — 小动作多，眼神飘忽
Overcome — holding it together, barely｜撑不住 — 勉强维持镇定
── OTHER ───────────────｜── 其他 ───────────────
Wired — electric, too much energy｜亢奋 — 精力过剩，浑身是电
Dissociated — present in body, absent in mind｜解离 — 身在现场，心已游离
Controlled — composure masking everything｜克制 — 用冷静掩盖一切
a woman walks slowly toward the camera on a rain-soaked city street at night

一定记得复制本地大模型路径到这里。如果是GGUF 模型，直接复制模型文件路径，而不是文件夹路径。
Remember to copy the local path of your LLM folder to here. if using GGUF , please copy the local path of the GGUF modle file, not folder!

inputs.text: A medium close-up shot features a Caucasian man with a closely shaven head and face, wearing a black baseball cap with "PNTR" in white letters on the front, and a dark grey t-shirt with "JUST DO IT" visible across his chest. A small black microphone is clipped to his shirt collar. He is positioned slightly to the left of the frame, looking intently downwards and to his right, his eyes focused off-camera. His facial expression is one of deep concentration, with his brow slightly furrowed. As he looks down, a quick sniff sound is heard, and then he speaks with a deep male voice and a slightly frustrated tone, saying, "I think it's so bad." The camera remains static throughout, maintaining a shallow depth of field, which keeps the man in sharp focus while the background is softly blurred, revealing a light-colored wall with white wooden shelving or trim, and a partially open white wooden door on the right. After a brief pause, another short, audible sniff is heard. The man then continues to speak, his voice maintaining the same quality, as he states, "So bad. So bad." He elaborates further, emphasizing his point with a final statement, "This got to be, it's got to be the worst tool I've ever seen."
